properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am a promise, I am a possibility, I am a promise With a capital “P”, I am a great big bundle of Potentiality And I am learning To hear God’s voice; And I am trying To make the right choice, I am a promise to be Anything God wants me to be.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are a promise You are a possibility You are a promise with a capital "P" You are a great big bundle of potentiality And if you'll listen You'll hear God's voice And if you're trying He'll help you make the right choices You're a promise to be Anything God's wants you to be

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You know something? It doesn't matter what your name is Where you live, who your dad is Or how big you are or what you look like Hey! What do you look like? Are you short, tall, fat, skinny? Got holes in your tennis shoes And freckles on your nose?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: It doesn't matter a bit You can be exactly what God wants you to be And he has something very special in mind for you It might be climbing mountains or sailing the sea Helping sick people get well or singing a song Whatever it is, you can do it

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You can go anywhere That he wants you to go You can be anything That he wants you to be You can climb the high mountain You can cross the wide sea You're a great big promise you see

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I am a promise I am a possibility I am a promise with a capital "P" I am a great big bundle of potentiality And I am learning To hear God's voice And I am tryin' To make the right choices I'm a promise to be Anything God wants me to be

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: So keep on list'ning To hear God's voice And keep on tryin' He'll help you make the right choices You're a promise to be Anything he wants you to be I'm a promise to be Anything God wants me to be We're a promise to be anything Anything he wants us to be

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Oh yeah! Oh yeah! Even you Bill
